name: Died-And-Went-to-Heaven Light Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add buttermilk, brown sugar, eggs, oil, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Whisk in the hot coffee. The batter will be quite thin.
4. Pour the batter into a greased, floured 12-cup bundt pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 60 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean.
6. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and cool.
